summary: Vendor Alias Learning feature fully tested - All 21 unit tests pass, all 13 API integration tests pass, frontend alias metrics section renders correctly
seed_data_creation: 2 manual aliases exist (Aaron Burrell Consulting, Tumalo Creek Transportation). No auto-learned aliases yet.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Alias Learning feature is complete. 2 manual aliases in vendor_aliases collection. alias-metrics-section shows in VendorIntelligenceCard (Vendor tab). Auto-learning hooks are in set_vendor_for_document and approve_document workflow handlers. Safety rules: ai_confidence >= 0.8, vendor_raw >= 3 chars.

coverage: Normalization - 12 tests (lowercase, LLC, Inc, Ltd, Corp, Co, punctuation, spaces, empty, None, meaningful words)
Alias Learning - 6 tests (new alias, low confidence skip, empty vendor_raw skip, identical normalized skip, reinforce existing, conflict skip)
Alias Lookup - 3 tests (found alias, no alias found, short input skip)

endpoints_tested: GET /api/aliases/metrics - returns required fields (total_aliases, auto_learned, alias_match_rate, top_aliases, vendor_match_rate)
GET /api/aliases/vendors/suggest - returns suggestion for new alias
GET /api/aliases/vendors/suggest - returns false for existing alias
POST /api/aliases/vendors - creates alias with normalized form

verified_features.normalization: normalize_vendor_name strips LLC, Inc, Ltd, Corp, Co, plc, gmbh, ag suffixes and lowercases
verified_features.metrics_endpoint: GET /api/aliases/metrics returns total_aliases=2, auto_learned=0, alias_match_rate=0, vendor_match_rate=51.9
verified_features.vendors_endpoint: GET /api/aliases/vendors returns 2 aliases (Aaron Burrell Consulting, Tumalo Creek Transportation)
verified_features.suggest_endpoint: Returns suggest_alias=true for new aliases, false for existing
verified_features.dashboard_integration: workflow-intelligence endpoint includes alias_metrics in vendor_intelligence section
verified_features.frontend_rendering: alias-metrics-section shows in VendorIntelligenceCard with Total Aliases, Auto-Learned, Alias Match Rate
verified_features.conflict_handling: Conflicting aliases (different vendor_id) are not overwritten

notes.auto_learned_count: Currently 0 because no documents have been approved through the workflow with ai_confidence >= 0.8 and vendor_raw >= 3 chars
notes.500_errors: Some 500 errors in console for unrelated endpoints (inventory-ledger), not affecting alias learning feature
